scripts.build: npm run build -w admin-web && npm run build -w vendor-web && npm run build -w support-web && npm run build -w oorjaman-web
scripts.expo:types: npm run expo:types -w customer-app && npm run expo:types -w technician-app
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run knip
scripts.brand:sync:mobile: npm run brand:sync && npm run brand:sync -w customer-app && npm run brand:sync -w technician-app
scripts.android:prebuild:customer: npm run brand:sync -w customer-app && node scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs customer-app "npx expo prebuild --platform android --clean"
scripts.android:prebuild:technician: npm run brand:sync -w technician-app && node scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs technician-app "npx expo prebuild --platform android --clean"
scripts.android:apk:debug:customer: npm run android:prebuild:customer && npm run android:local-props && npm run android:clear-autolinking -- customer-app && node scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs customer-app "cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug"
scripts.android:apk:debug:technician: npm run android:prebuild:technician && npm run android:local-props && npm run android:clear-autolinking -- technician-app && node scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs technician-app "cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug"
scripts.android:apk:uat:customer: npm run android:prebuild:customer && npm run android:local-props && npm run android:clear-autolinking -- customer-app && node scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs customer-app "cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease" && node scripts/rename-uat-apk.mjs customer-app release
scripts.android:apk:uat:technician: npm run android:prebuild:technician && npm run android:local-props && npm run android:clear-autolinking -- technician-app && node scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs technician-app "cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease" && node scripts/rename-uat-apk.mjs technician-app release
scripts.eas:android:uat:customer: npm run brand:sync -w customer-app && node scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs customer-app "npx eas-cli build --profile uat --platform android"
scripts.eas:android:uat:technician: npm run brand:sync -w technician-app && node scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs technician-app "npx eas-cli build --profile uat --platform android"
scripts.eas:android:uat:local:customer: npm run brand:sync -w customer-app && node scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs customer-app "npx eas-cli build --profile uat --platform android --local"
scripts.eas:android:uat:local:technician: npm run brand:sync -w technician-app && node scripts/run-with-expo-env.mjs technician-app "npx eas-cli build --profile uat --platform android --local"
scripts.eas:android:uat: npm run eas:android:uat:customer && npm run eas:android:uat:technician
